items.name: 第1号 石狩弁天社
items.description: 松前藩から派遣された秋味上乗役の山下半右衛門により1694年（元禄7年）創建。主神は弁財天（厳島大明神）、合殿に妙亀法鮫大明神、稲荷大明神。妙亀法鮫大明神像は2007年3月に北海道有形民俗文化財に指定。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Ishikari Benten Shrine (designation No. 1). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1967-12-22, located at Benten-cho 18, Ishikari City.

items.name: 第2号 チョウザメのはく製
items.location: 石狩市弁天町30-4(砂丘の風資料館)、所蔵：石狩市教育委員会
items.description: 昭和44年に石狩川で捕獲され剥製にされた。体長1.9mのダウリアチョウザメ。

en.name_en: No. 2 Taxidermy Specimen of a Sturgeon
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a taxidermy specimen of a sturgeon (designation No. 2). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1982-03-31, located at Benten-cho 30-4, Ishikari City (Sakyu no Kaze Museum), held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

items.name: 第3号 石狩八幡町遺跡ワッカオイ出土の土器9点
items.location: 所蔵：石狩市教育委員会
items.description: 員数9点。石狩八幡町遺跡ワッカオイ地点(現：若生C遺跡)第20号墓から出土。続縄文時代後半期の代表的なもの。

en.name_romaji: Dai-sangō Ishikari Hachimanchō Iseki Wakkaoi Shutsudo no Doki Kyūten
en.name_en: No. 3 Nine Pieces of Pottery Excavated at Wakkaoi, Ishikari Hachimancho Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of nine pieces of pottery excavated at Wakkaoi of the Ishikari Hachimancho site (designation No. 3). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1982-03-31, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

items.name: 第4号 旧長野商店
items.location: 石狩市弁天町30-5（砂丘の風資料館の隣）
items.description: 店舗は1894（明治27）年、蔵は明治10年代(推定)に長野徳太郎が建造。和洋折衷の木骨石造。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Nagano store (designation No. 4). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1994-03-28, located at Benten-cho 30-5, Ishikari City (next to the Sakyu no Kaze Museum).

items.name: 第5号 金子家文書
items.location: 所蔵：石狩市教育委員会
items.description: 金子仲久が寄贈した文書1600点余りのうち、1892（明治25）年から1900（明治33）年までの記録など10点が指定。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of documents of the Kaneko family (designation No. 5). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1999-04-22, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

items.name: 第6号 旧白鳥番屋
items.description: 指定年月日1981（昭和56）年12月（日不明のためnull）。1899（明治32）年白鳥浅吉建設のニシン番屋。現：はまます郷土資料館。1981年浜益村指定文化財に指定（現石狩市指定文化財）。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Shiratori banya (fishing lodge) (designation No. 6). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, located at Hamamasu 77, Hamamasu-ku, Ishikari City.

items.name: 第7号 石狩弁天社の手水鉢
items.location: 石狩市弁天町30-4(砂丘の風資料館)、所蔵：石狩市教育委員会
items.description: 1789（寛政元）年の年号が刻まれた手水鉢。江戸本材木町の小林店喜兵衛が奉納。

en.name_en: No. 7 Water Basin of the Ishikari Benten Shrine
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the chozubachi (water ablution basin) of the Ishikari Benten Shrine (designation No. 7). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2013-03-28, located at Benten-cho 30-4, Ishikari City (Sakyu no Kaze Museum), held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

items.name: 第8号 石狩紅葉山49号遺跡出土の木製品
items.location: 所蔵：石狩市教育委員会
items.description: 員数18点。縄文文化の木製品。約4000年前。

en.name_romaji: Dai-hachigō Ishikari Momijiyama Yonjūkyūgō Iseki Shutsudo no Mokuseihin
en.name_en: No. 8 Wooden Artifacts Excavated from the Ishikari Momijiyama No. 49 Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of wooden artifacts excavated from the Ishikari Momijiyama No. 49 site (designation No. 8). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2015-07-24, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

items.name: 第9号 古潭龍澤寺の鰐口
items.location: 所在地1：石狩市厚田98-2(道の駅石狩あいろーど厚田2階)／所在地2：札幌市厚別区厚別町小野幌53-2(北海道博物館に寄託)
items.description: 鰐口2点。うち1点に「松前城下村山傳兵衛」「寛政三年亥年三月吉日」、もう1点に「寛政四壬子歳八月廿日」と刻銘。

en.name_en: No. 9 Gong of Ryutakuji Temple at Kotan
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the waniguchi (temple gong) of Ryutakuji Temple at Kotan (designation No. 9). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2016-10-27, located at Atsuta 98-2, Ishikari City (Ishikari Airoad Atsuta roadside station, 2nd floor), with a second location where it is deposited at the Hokkaido Museum, Onopporo, Atsubetsu-cho, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo City.

items.name: 第10号 紅葉山33号遺跡出土の漆塗り弓（文様入り）
items.location: 所蔵：石狩市教育委員会
items.description: 続縄文文化前半期の墓に副葬された漆塗り弓（約2000年前）。全体に朱色の漆を塗り文様を描いた。

en.name_romaji: Dai-jūgō Momijiyama Sanjūsangō Iseki Shutsudo no Urushinuri Yumi (Monyō-iri)
en.name_en: No. 10 Lacquered Bow with Patterns Excavated from the Momijiyama No. 33 Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a lacquered bow with patterns excavated from the Momijiyama No. 33 site (designation No. 10). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2025-06-30, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.
